THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOREY, PHILIP STOREY, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILLS VISTAS HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION C/O HSM SF INC $4,015.50 PRINCIPAL, $253.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,268.50, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK: RECD RETURN MAIL 11/16/21. CERTIFIED MAILING OF SC-100 MAILED TO JERALD JOSEPH-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER STOREY AND WILLIAM STOREY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT CATHERDRAL HILLS VISTAS HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KENYAN POTTER, BOARD MEMBER AND MR. LINN PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILLS VISTAS HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION C/O HSM SF INC
ORDER (SC-108A) ON THE REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT GRANTED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL **GRANTED**
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108); RE: AMOUNT OF REWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOREY, PHILIP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOREY, PHILIP STOREY, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILLS VISTAS HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION C/O HSM SF INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOREY, PHILIP STOREY, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILLS VISTAS HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION C/O HSM SF INC $1,338.50 PRINCIPAL, $253.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,591.50, THERE WAS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO CHARGE PLAINTIFF FOR ALL OF THE EXCESS WATER FROM DECEMBER 2020 - MARCH 2021. PLAINTIFFS PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF TOILET REPAIR. THE DEFENDANT DID NOT HAVE ALL FOUR UNITS IN THE BUILDING INSPECTED BY A PROFESSIONAL PLUMBER AND THERE WAS EVIDENCE THAT THE COMMON FIRE SPRINKLER WAS LEAKING AT SOME POINT DURING THE PERIOD IN QUESTION. THE COURT REDUCES THE BILL TO 25% OF THE CHARGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
